title: Small Netherite Beacons
description: Put a Netherite block below a beacon in your pyramid to get full beacon effects.
body:
## Small Netherite Beacons

![Beacon with Netherite block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5d60e258b16eba5654481b72025ed3e2816434b.png)

Turn a small 3x3 beacon into a full beacon by placing a single netherite block below the beacon block.

This will make it easier to build/move/remove full beacons or to fit them into tight spaces.

### More mods
Do you like this mod? Try some other mods I made, like:
- [Harou's Leashed Fences](https://modrinth.com/mod/harous-leashed-fences)
- [Phantoms in the End](https://modrinth.com/mod/phantoms-in-the-end) 
- [Harou's Netherite Shulkers](https://modrinth.com/mod/harous-netherite-shulkers)
